title: Saro´s Skin Changer
body:
![https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Skin_Changer/MP_SarosSkinChanger_header.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Skin_Changer/MP_SarosSkinChanger_header.webp)

# SarosSkinChanger

SarosSkinChanger is a Minecraft Forge mod that lets you change your player skin directly in-game.  
It focuses on an easy-to-use interface and seamless multiplayer support, so you can always customize your appearance — whether in singleplayer or on a server.  

---

## ✨ Minecraft 1.20.1 (Latest)
This version brings the classic features of SarosSkinChanger to the newest Minecraft generation, with a polished UI and better multiplayer integration.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Skin_Changer/MP_SarosSkinChanger_features.webp)

- **Modern Upload UI:** Upload skins directly in-game with a file browser and live PNG preview  
- **Skin Gallery:** Browse, apply, and delete skins with thumbnail previews  
- **Server Sync:** Skins are automatically shared across players in multiplayer  
- **Classic & Slim Models:** Automatic detection of skin format (64x32, 64x64 classic, 64x64 slim)  
- **Persistence:** Skins and settings are saved locally and restored when joining servers  
- **Easy Access:** Use `/skin`, `/skin reset`, or the **K** keybind to open the interface  
- **Stable & Polished:** General improvements for smoother gameplay experience  

---

## 🕹️ Minecraft 1.12.2 (Legacy)
The original release of SarosSkinChanger for Forge 1.12.2.  
Still fully functional, focusing on simple skin changes with basic tools.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Skin_Changer/MP_SarosSkinChanger_features.webp)

- **In-Game Skin Change:** Open a GUI with `/skin` to change your skin without leaving the game  
- **File Selection:** Choose your skin file with a built-in file dialog  
- **Drag & Drop:** Quickly drag and drop skin files into the game  
- **Preview:** Check how your skin looks before applying  
- **Skin Reset:** Revert to your original skin anytime  
- **Skin History:** Switch back to previously used skins with ease  
- **Server Support:** Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments  
- **Persistence:** Skins are saved in local directories for consistency across sessions  

---

![How to Use](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Skin_Changer/MP_SarosSkinChanger_how.webp)

### How to Use
- Type `/skin` or press **K** (1.20.1+) to open the skin changer UI  
- Select a skin via file browser or drag & drop  
- Preview the skin in real time before applying  
- Reset or switch back using history or reset options  

---

![vid](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Skin_Changer/MP_SarosSkinChanger_video.webp)
